reason: Commit 2ab791cb is a prose rewrite and markdown reformatting pass on ai/approval-engine/customize-behavior.mdx. The two substantive removals — (1) 'webhook' as a valid nodeType in the StepView interface prose and (2) the 'Versioning and stability' section — are both already correctly represented in the skill rules. rest-object-views.md already carries StepView.nodeType as 'agent' | 'human' (patched by the prior series), and rest-foundations.md already documents /v1/ and /v2/ as active aliases. The Webhook delivery section restructuring (moved under ## Events with subsections) is organizational only with no content change. All other edits are table alignment, sentence rewording, and theme={null} annotations on code fences — none affect rule content.
